title: The Five Elders Descend
description: On pages 6–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Kuma, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Dorry, Luffy as Luffy’s Gear Fifth form re-enters the battle while the giants arrive, Vegapunk’s broadcast begins, and the Five Elders become the island’s central threat.
scene: Luffy’s Gear Fifth form re-enters the battle while the giants arrive, Vegapunk’s broadcast begins, and the Five Elders become the island’s central threat.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is so frustrating! I can't cut loose; we'd just be hurting ourselves by taking out those units!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'd be unprecedented, but is there any chance of calling off the buster call for now?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Vegapunk himself gave that pirate the authority to command the Pacific, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: There's no way we can stop!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After this, there's no doubt he's Rebel Scum!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We should focus on getting the Pacific back on our side!

dialogue.speaker: Kuma
dialogue.text: That means taking jewelry Bonney's head!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All available Vice Admirals should leave their stations and hunt her down immediately!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Her current escape route from the center of the fabric-stratum will lead her to the Northeast coast!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We must eliminate her!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Roger that, toss here.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm already hot on their heels! I'll get them!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: These fingers will drag her to hell!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My ten-barrel finger gun can even rip open armor!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Crap, it's a marine!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Tosa Crunch!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: BLUGH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: GyaAAA AAA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Huh?! There are giants on this island?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are they enemies, too? We're in a rush, y'know!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: GA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We checked the bounty posters to make sure we'd recognize the new members,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But none of you look familiar. Are you researchers?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We've come to get the straw hats!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What for? Luffy's my captain; do you have a grudge against him?!

summary: This part advances the Nika Returns on Egghead through 26 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
